name: MD ZAHID HASAN NEROB
title: BSc CS Student at BRAC University & Cybersecurity Enthusiast
bio: I am a Computer Science student at BRAC University (Class of 2026), deeply interested in Cyber Security, Cryptanalysis, and AI. My research focuses on Lightweight Cryptography for IoT, specifically implementing block ciphers like Ascon-128 and ChaCha20 for low-power devices. I am an investigative, self-motivated, and collaborative developer with a passion for problem-solving.

projects.title: AI-Powered Personal Portfolio
projects.description: A modern, dark-themed personal portfolio website featuring a smart floating AI chat widget that autonomously answers visitor questions by parsing a centralized configuration file.

projects.title: Sovereign Guard
projects.description: A full-stack secure social platform ensuring robust cryptographic integrity. Features completely from-scratch implementations of cryptographic algorithms like RSA without relying on built-in crypto libraries.

projects.title: Diabetes Prediction Model
projects.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes in patients based on clinical features from a 100,000-record dataset, utilizing supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.

projects.title: AI Chatbot Widget
projects.description: A full-stack, plug-and-play AI chatbot widget for businesses featuring a floating bubble, unread badges, typing indicators, and full message history.

skills: Web Security (XSS, SQL Injection, JWT Tampering)
